# Stack Profile
<!-- Auto-generated by /critic-review. Edit to customize. -->

## Tech Stack
Bash CLI scaffold tool generating Next.js 16, TypeScript 6, tRPC 11, Supabase, Zod 4, Biome 2, Tailwind 4 projects

## Analysis Scope
- CLI script correctness (Bash, file operations, string replacement)
- Template file correctness (Next.js 16 App Router, proxy.ts, async APIs)
- Dependency version accuracy and compatibility
- Composable variant overlay logic
- Claude Code integration (hooks, settings, MCP)

## Best Practices
- Next.js 16: proxy.ts (not middleware.ts), async request APIs, Cache Components
- Supabase: createServerClient with cookie handling, RLS-first auth
- tRPC v11: inputSchema, Standard Schema, RSC prefetching
- Zod 4: top-level validators, { error: } syntax, .prefault() for input defaults
- TypeScript 6: explicit types array, no baseUrl, moduleResolution: bundler
- Biome 2: includes field, linter.domains, assist.actions.source

## Analysis Format
- Template files: `scaffolds/nextjs/template/**/*.{ts,tsx,json,css}`
- CLI script: `bin/scaffold`
- Claude configs: `scaffolds/nextjs/claude/**/*`
- DevOps: `scaffolds/nextjs/devops/**/*`
- Composable overlay: `scaffolds/nextjs/composable/**/*`
